changes: Retaliation: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 45 seconds.
Aetheric Burst: Potency has been increased from 1,200 to 1,600.
Atonement: Increase to Oath Gauge bar has been changed from 5 to 10.
Glory Slash: Increase to Oath Gauge bar has been changed from 5 to 10.
Bloodspiller: The additional effect 'Absorbs 100% of damage dealt as HP' has been added.
Quietus: The additional effect 'Absorbs 100% of damage dealt as HP' has been added.
Draw and Junction: Detrimental effect duration has been increased from 10 to 15 seconds. Beneficial effect duration has been reduced from 60 to 15 seconds.
Tornado Kick: Potency has been reduced from 2,000 to 1,800.
Heat Blast: Potency has been increased from 1,200 to 1,400.
Saber Dance: Potency has been increased from 1,800 to 2,000.

Standard Finish: Potency for 0 steps has been changed from 200-600 to 300-600. Potency for 1 step has been changed from 400-1,200 to 600-1,200. Potency for 2 steps has been changed from 600-1,800 to 900-1,800.

Technical Finish: Potency for 0 steps has been changed from 200-600 to 300-600. Potency for 1 step has been changed from 400-1,200 to 600-1,200. Potency for 2 steps has been changed from 600-1,800 to 900-1,800. Potency for 3 steps has been changed from 800-2,400 to 1,200-2,400. Potency for 4 steps has been changed from 1,000-3,000 to 1,500 to 3,000.
Thunder: Damage required to trigger Thundercloud has been increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Thunder III: Damage required to trigger Thundercloud has been increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Wither: Potency has been increased from 1,000 to 1,600.
Aura Blast: Potency has been increased from 1,600 to 2,000.

Succor: The additional effect 'Increases Faerie Gauge by 5 for each party member healed when used to restore HP of self or a party member while in combat' has been changed to 'Increases Faerie Gauge by 10 when used to restore HP of self or a party member while in combat.'
Dissipation: The additional effect 'Increases damage dealt by 25%' has been added. Effect duration has been increased from 6 to 10.
Gravity: Potency has been increased from 800 to 1,600.
Lord of Crowns: Effect duration has been increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Lady of Crowns: Effect duration has been increased from 10 to 15 seconds.

new_content.name: The Cloud Deck (Extreme)
new_content.description: Extreme difficulty trial; moved from Raid Finder to Duty Finder; drop rate for Diamond Gwiber Trumpet increased.

new_content.name: Eden's Promise (Savage)
new_content.description: Savage raid tier; Echo strength increased to 15%; weekly restriction on Blades of Lost Antiquity removed.

new_content.name: Tower at Paradigm's Breach
new_content.description: Alliance raid; weekly restrictions on rewards and Breach Coins removed; added various items to treasure chests.

new_content.name: Bozjan southern front
new_content.description: Exploration zone; Mettle rewards increased for Resistance ranks 1-14; drop rate for Loathsome Memory of the Dying increased.

new_content.name: Zadnor
new_content.description: Exploration zone; Mettle rewards increased for Resistance ranks 1-14; adjustments to critical engagement 'On Serpents' Wings'.

new_content.name: The Feast
new_content.npc_location: Feast Quartermaster at the Wolves' Den Pier

new_content.name: Battle of Castrum Lacus Litore
new_content.description: Critical engagement; adjustments made to 4th Legion helldiver, NPC ally tunnel armor, and gate switch mechanic.

new_content.name: Auto-Logout
new_content.description: System feature; automatically logs out players inactive for more than 30 minutes to ease server congestion.

housing.description: A furnishing item obtained as a reward from the Tower at Paradigm's Breach.

housing.description: A furnishing item obtained as a reward from the Tower at Paradigm's Breach.

housing.description: A furnishing item obtained as a reward from the Tower at Paradigm's Breach.
